raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Principal scope today","name":"What does Principal scope mean on this team to you right now?","description":"Surfaces whether Tom is operating from current expectations or old assumptions.","purpose":"topic","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Visible leverage","name":"Where do you think your leverage is most visible in the work today?","description":"Looks for concrete examples of impact beyond steady delivery.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Trust beyond team","name":"What have you done recently to build trust outside your immediate team?","description":"Checks cross-team influence and whether trust is being built deliberately.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Hard call example","name":"Tell me about a recent judgment call where you chose to escalate rather than handle it yourself.","description":"Probes how he weighs ownership against escalation in ambiguous situations.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Questioning cadence","name":"What tends to stop you from asking a question early?","description":"Surfaces the pattern behind low early alignment and whether it is habit, context, or caution.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Old assumptions","name":"Which assumptions from your last team are you still carrying here?","description":"Tests whether prior operating patterns are shaping his choices on the new team.","purpose":"topic","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision visibility","name":"How visible are your tradeoffs to the people around you?","description":"Checks whether his judgment is legible to stakeholders or staying implicit.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Leverage shift","name":"What would you change in how you work to create more leverage here?","description":"Moves from steady execution toward a concrete shift in Principal-level impact.","purpose":"competency","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next signal","name":"What would you want me to see differently by our next check-in?","description":"Closes on a specific behavioural change or visible signal without opening new topics.","purpose":"competency","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
